scripts.check:phase1-workspace: npm run check:phase1-workspace:static && npm run check:phase1-workspace:browser
scripts.check:phase2-workspace: npm run check:phase2-workspace:static && npm run check:phase2-workspace:browser
scripts.check:phase3-workspace: npm run check:phase3-workspace:static && npm run check:phase3-workspace:browser
scripts.check:phase4-workspace: npm run check:phase4-workspace:static && npm run check:phase4-workspace:browser
scripts.check:phase5-workspace: npm run check:phase5-workspace:static && npm run check:phase5-workspace:browser

scripts.check:phase8-workspace: npm run check:phase8-workspace:static && npm run check:phase8-workspace:browser
scripts.check:workspace-browser: playwright test e2e/phase1-analysis-workspace.spec.js e2e/phase2-workspace-dataset.spec.js e2e/phase3-viewport-renderer.spec.js e2e/phase4-viewport-picking.spec.js e2e/phase5-analysis-capabilities.spec.js e2e/phase6-analysis-sessions.spec.js e2e/phase7-analysis-ledger.spec.js e2e/phase8-engineering-geometry.spec.js e2e/smoke.spec.js e2e/u7-workflow-smoke.spec.js
scripts.ci:u0: npm run check:full && npm run check:qa -- --skip-e2e && npm run check:phase2-workspace:static && npm run check:phase3-workspace:static && npm run check:phase4-workspace:static && npm run check:phase5-workspace:static && npm run check:phase6-workspace:static && npm run check:phase7-workspace:static && npm run check:phase8-workspace:static && npm run check:workspace-browser && npm run check:u0 && npm run build
scripts.ci:u3: npm run ci:u0 && npm run check:u3 && npm run check:u3:behavior && npm run check:benchmarks

scripts.ci:release: npm run check:u7 && npm run check:release && npm run check:benchmarks && npm run build
